rulings.Case Title: GARRETT VAN WAGONER VS. CARREN SUE SHAGLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The Affirmative Defenses Of Defts Carren Due Shagley, Earl Shagley
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JUNE 17, 2008 LINE 9. PLAINTIFFS GARRETT WAGONER AND LORI WAGONER'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The Affirmative Defenses Of DEFENDANTS Carren Due Shagley AND Earl Shagley IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENSES FOUR, FIVE, SIX, EIGHT, TEN AND TWELVE AND WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE REST. FACTS SUPPORTING EACH DEFENSE SHOULD BE PLEADED UNDER EACH DEFENSE. =(302/PHA/PB)
